purpose: Runnable formula pack for the live site. The homepage formula lab covers the browser-runnable subset; this file adds stable identifiers, code snippets, dependencies, and sample evaluations.

formulas.name: Firmament Height
formulas.description: Primary height curve used across geometry, solar elevation, and southern-zone extensions.

inputs.r_km: radius from Axis Mundi in km

formulas.name: Aetheric Refraction Index
formulas.description: Refraction layer used in the V13 scaffold and southern metric interpretation.

inputs.r_km: radius from Axis Mundi in km

formulas.name: Southern Reflection
formulas.description: Mirrored southern-zone reflection used in the V13 two-zone topology.

formulas.name: Eclipse Kappa Coupling
formulas.description: Magnetic-to-gravity coupling used in the Tier 3 eclipse protocol.

formulas.name: FSF Station Scaling
formulas.description: Field Strength Factor used for eclipse station scaling.
formulas.javascript: function fsf(latDeg){ var lat=Math.max(0.1, Math.abs(latDeg)); var rad=lat*Math.PI/180; return 0.19550 / Math.pow(Math.sin(rad), 0.1640) * Math.pow(32.974, lat / 90); }

formulas.name: V13 Ovoid East-West Arc
formulas.description: Elliptic-integral east-west arc used in the V13 ovoid geometry.
formulas.implementation_note: Requires an elliptic integral function such as scipy.special.ellipe or mpmath.ellipe.
